game.title: Godfather's Table
howto.end.winner: The {{winner}} is the player who has collected the most money, even if they were eliminated before the game ended. In case of a tie, the player whose gangsters survived the longest wins.
howto.card.KNIFE.name: Knife
howto.card.KNIFE.desc: Allows you to eliminate an opponent to the left or right of one of your Blade Slingers, or an opponent to the left or right of a gangster sitting in front of a knife icon.
howto.card.GUN.name: Gun
howto.card.GUN.desc: Used to eliminate an opponent directly facing one of your Gunmen, or an opponent facing a gangster who has a revolver icon in front of them.
howto.card.ORDER_CAKE.name: Order a Cake
howto.card.ORDER_CAKE.desc: Place your cake on any spot, even if occupied by a gangster.
howto.card.PASS_CAKE.name: Pass Cake
howto.card.PASS_CAKE.desc: Move an opponent's cake one spot to the left or right of your own cake.
howto.card.EXPLODE_CAKE.name: Explode Cake
howto.card.EXPLODE_CAKE.desc: Explode an opponent's cake, eliminating all gangsters immediately to its left, right, or facing it.
howto.card.SLEEPING_PILL.name: Sleeping Pill
howto.card.SLEEPING_PILL.desc: Place a sleeping pill token in front of up to three opponents who have a glass icon in front of them. A second sleeping pill eliminates the gangster permanently.
howto.card.POLICE_RAID.name: Police Raid
howto.card.POLICE_RAID.desc: All players remove their gangsters from the board and then reposition them. The player who played the card starts the repositioning.
howto.card.DISPLACEMENT.name: Displacement
howto.card.DISPLACEMENT.desc: Move one of your gangsters to a free spot. You can play this after an action card or play two move cards in one turn.
howto.turn.0.label: Explode your cake
howto.turn.0.desc: If you placed a cake on your previous turn, it explodes now, eliminating gangsters in front, to the left, and to the right of it.
howto.turn.1.label: Receive Cash
howto.turn.1.desc: Collect income based on your board presence: $1,000 if your Godfather is alive and awake · $1,000 for each business (Bars, Restaurants, Casinos) you control · $4,000 for a monopoly (two spots of the same business type) · Income is doubled if a gang member is at the Cash Register. Sleeping gangsters bring in nothing.
howto.turn.2.label: Play Cards
howto.turn.2.desc: Play one action card and optionally one move card. Then, automatically draw back up to a hand of five cards.
howto.turn.3.label: Wake up!
howto.turn.3.desc: Sleeping pill tokens are removed from your gang members to bring them back into play.
howto.end.rule.0: Only one player remains (they collect all remaining money on the table).
howto.end.rule.1: There is no money left on the table.
howto.end.rule.2: The last gangsters are all eliminated by an explosion.
game.select_card: Select a card from your hand to play
game.select_gangster: Select one of your gangsters to use the {{card}} card
game.no_gangsters: No valid gangsters. Cancel and try another card.
game.select_cake_move: Select a cake bomb to move
game.select_cake_explode: Select a cake bomb to explode
game.knife.target: Select a target on the board to attack
game.gun.confirm_target: Confirm to shoot the gangster in front
game.displacement.select: Select an empty position to move your gangster
game.ordercake.select: Select a position to place a cake bomb
game.gun.detail: Shoot gangster in front of position {{pos}}
game.second_disp: Play a displacement card as your second action?
game.discard.hint: You'll draw a new card to replace it
game.pills.1: Select a gangster to put to sleep (1 of up to 3)
game.pills.hint: Click a highlighted gangster on the board
game.pills.detail: {{count}} gangster(s) will be put to sleep
game.seating.gangster.hint: Click a blinking gangster icon in the panel on the right
game.seating.seat.hint: Click a highlighted seat on the board
game.seating.confirm.hint: Place the gangster in the selected seat
card.desc.KNIFE: Slash a gangster immediately to your left or right. If the adjacent seat is occupied by an enemy, they are eliminated and removed from the board. Your gangster must be alive and seated to use this card.
card.desc.GUN: Shoot the gangster sitting directly across the table from yours. If the opposite seat is occupied, they are eliminated. If the seat is empty, the shot misses — but the card is still spent.
card.desc.DISPLACEMENT: Move one of your gangsters from their current seat to any unoccupied seat on the board. Can also be used as a second action after your first play — if you have a Displacement card in hand after playing another card, you get the option to move.
card.desc.ORDER_CAKE: Place a cake bomb on any seat on the board. The bomb is armed this round and will automatically explode at the start of your NEXT turn, eliminating anyone seated to the left, right, and center of the blast. Plan ahead — your own gangsters can be caught in the blast.
card.desc.PASS_CAKE: Nudge an existing cake bomb one seat to the left or right. Use this to redirect a bomb toward an enemy, or push it away from your own gangsters before it explodes.
card.desc.EXPLODE_CAKE: Manually trigger a cake bomb right now — no waiting for next round. The explosion hits the center seat and both adjacent seats. Any gangster caught in the blast is eliminated. Great for a surprise strike.
card.desc.POLICE_RAID: The cops show up and clear the entire board. Every gangster is removed and all players must re-seat their gang from scratch, in turn order starting with you. Powerful for disrupting strong positions. WARNING: this card is permanently removed from the deck once played — it will not be reshuffled.
card.desc.SLEEPING_PILLS: Drug up to 3 enemy gangsters sitting at bar or drink seats. Sleeping gangsters skip their turn but stay on the board. They wake up at the end of their owner's next turn. Useful for neutralizing threats without eliminating them.
results.subtitle: The Family Has Spoken
results.title: Final Results
confirm.restart.title: Restart Game?
confirm.restart.msg: All progress will be lost. The family will have to start over.
confirm.mp.msg: This will end the game for all players and redirect everyone to the menu.
confirm.leave.title: Leave Game?
confirm.leave.msg: You sure you want to leave the table?
